hypothesis:
## Hypothesis

Incorporating a learned symmetry-aware regularization term that penalizes deviations from the nearest plausible space group during XRD-conditioned structure generation will reduce the basin of attraction for spurious local minima more effectively than post-hoc projection-based constraints, enabling gradient-based refinement to recover correct crystal structures even under high lattice noise (σ_l > 0.1) without requiring prior knowledge of the exact crystal family.
